languages.text: "Мы только что ее отростки побили, и это еще не самые большие. Представляете, какого размера сама тварь? То-то же". {n}Солдат вытирает со лба испарину.{/n} "А вообще, давайте обождем с лишними разговорами. Тут небезопасно".

traits.locale_text: "Мы только что ее отростки побили, и это еще не самые большие. Представляете, какого размера сама тварь? То-то же". {n}Солдат вытирает со лба испарину.{/n} "А вообще, давайте обождем с лишними разговорами. Тут небезопасно".

languages.text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more idle talk for now. It's not safe here."
languages.original_text: "Мы только что ее отростки побили, и это еще не самые большие. Представляете, какого размера сама тварь? То-то же". {n}Солдат вытирает со лба испарину.{/n} "А вообще, давайте обождем с лишними разговорами. Тут небезопасно".

"We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more idle talk for now. It's not safe here."

languages.text: «Acabamos de enfrentarnos a sus zarcillos, y ni siquiera eran los más grandes. ¿Se hace a la idea de lo grande que es la criatura en sí? Pues eso». {n}El soldado se seca el sudor de la frente.{/n} «Sea como sea, será mejor dejar el tema para luego. Aquí corremos peligro».
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: «Acabamos de enfrentarnos a sus zarcillos, y ni siquiera eran los más grandes. ¿Se hace a la idea de lo grande que es la criatura en sí? Pues eso». {n}El soldado se seca el sudor de la frente.{/n} «Sea como sea, será mejor dejar el tema para luego. Aquí corremos peligro».

languages.text: “我们刚才对付的是它的触须，而且还不是最大的那种。你能想象那东西的本体大到什么程度吗？就是你想的那样。”{n}士兵擦了擦额头上的汗水。{/n}“行了，先别聊了。这儿不安全。”
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: “我们刚才对付的是它的触须，而且还不是最大的那种。你能想象那东西的本体大到什么程度吗？就是你想的那样。”{n}士兵擦了擦额头上的汗水。{/n}“行了，先别聊了。这儿不安全。”

languages.text: « Nous venons d'affronter ses vrilles, et encore, ce n'étaient même pas les plus grosses. Je vous laisse imaginer la taille du bestiau dans son ensemble. » {n}Le soldat essuie la sueur qui perle sur son front.{/n} « Bref, assez bavardé pour le moment. Nous ne sommes pas en sécurité, ici. »
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: « Nous venons d'affronter ses vrilles, et encore, ce n'étaient même pas les plus grosses. Je vous laisse imaginer la taille du bestiau dans son ensemble. » {n}Le soldat essuie la sueur qui perle sur son front.{/n} « Bref, assez bavardé pour le moment. Nous ne sommes pas en sécurité, ici. »

languages.text: "Daha şimdi dokunaçlarıyla savaştık, hem de en büyükleri bile değillerdi. O şeyin ne kadar büyük olduğunu hayal edebiliyor musunuz? Aynen öyle." {n}Asker, alnındaki teri siliyor.{/n} "Neyse, şimdilik konuşmayı bırakalım. Burası güvenli değil."
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: "Daha şimdi dokunaçlarıyla savaştık, hem de en büyükleri bile değillerdi. O şeyin ne kadar büyük olduğunu hayal edebiliyor musunuz? Aynen öyle." {n}Asker, alnındaki teri siliyor.{/n} "Neyse, şimdilik konuşmayı bırakalım. Burası güvenli değil."

languages.text: 「その蔓を倒したばかりなのに、それすら最大じゃない。その本体の大きさを想像してみて。まさに。」{n}兵士は額の汗を拭う.{/n}「とにかく、今はもう話はやめておこう。ここはおそらく安全ではない。」
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: 「その蔓を倒したばかりなのに、それすら最大じゃない。その本体の大きさを想像してみて。まさに。」{n}兵士は額の汗を拭う.{/n}「とにかく、今はもう話はやめておこう。ここはおそらく安全ではない。」

languages.text: "Wir haben nur gegen seine Tentakel gekämpft, und die waren nicht sonderlich groß. Könnt Ihr Euch vorstellen, wie groß dieses Ding ist? Genau." {n}Der Soldat wischt sich den Schweiß von der Stirn.{/n} "Egal, halten wir uns nicht mit langen Reden auf. Wir sind hier nicht sicher."
languages.original_text: "We just fought its tendrils, and those weren't even the largest. Can you imagine the size of the thing itself? Exactly." {n}The soldier wipes the sweat from his brow.{/n} "Anyway, let's hold off on any more talk for now. It's not safe here."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben nur gegen seine Tentakel gekämpft, und die waren nicht sonderlich groß. Könnt Ihr Euch vorstellen, wie groß dieses Ding ist? Genau." {n}Der Soldat wischt sich den Schweiß von der Stirn.{/n} "Egal, halten wir uns nicht mit langen Reden auf. Wir sind hier nicht sicher."
